relationships.context: V starts the process with ideas
V promotes high-potential ideas to this folder
Socratic is used to explore ideas in the exploration folder
Adversarial is used to explore ideas in the exploration folder
First Principles is used to explore ideas in the exploration folder
the final result of exploring ideas is documented in Synthesis.md
the results may be promoted to Canon
